description: QPU Thermal Overload on QFE-200 - all fans operational but temps high
fix_applied: Replaced thermal paste on QPU-2 and QPU-3

description: Intermittent Memory Allocation Failure under moderate load on QFE-200
fix_applied: Reduced gc_interval to 30s and buffer_size to 2048KB as temporary workaround

description: Flux Capacitor Module Degradation on QFE-100 - FCM health 52%
fix_applied: Replaced FCM (QF-FCM-2400) and ran full calibration

description: QF-003 on QFE-200 - FCM health 58% - customer wants to avoid downtime
fix_applied: Experimental quantum buffer reset and recalibration extended FCM life ~3 months

description: New QFE-300 warmup completed in 5 min instead of 10 min - QPU temps only 68C
fix_applied: Updated firmware from v2.3.1 to v2.4.1 - warmup bug fixed

description: Frequent QF-004 Network Partition alerts on QFE-200 cluster - 2-3 per day
fix_applied: Whitelisted cluster traffic on security appliance and increased heartbeat timeout

description: QF-005 Storage Degraded on QFE-300 - two drives showing SMART errors
fix_applied: Hot-swapped both drives - RAID rebuild took 4.5 hours

description: New QFE-100 calibration Step 2 fails - Lane 3 clock instability
fix_applied: RMA'd QPU module - replacement installed and calibration passed

description: Customer asks about optimal max_threads for QFE-200 mixed workload
fix_applied: Benchmarked values 8-24 - confirmed default of 16 is optimal

description: QF-008 Data Integrity Failure after power loss on QFE-200
fix_applied: Restored from WAL checkpoint - lost ~45 seconds of data - recommended UPS upgrade

description: Buffer overflow warnings with large JSON payloads on QFE-100
fix_applied: Increased buffer_size to 8192KB and reduced max_threads to 12 - experimental config

description: QF-003 on QFE-300 - two FCMs at 45% and 51% health - unit 22 months old
fix_applied: Replaced both degraded FCMs - other two at 78% and 82%

description: Customer wants ZSTD compression instead of LZ4 for compliance archival
fix_applied: Switched to ZSTD - better ratio (3.4:1 vs 2.1:1) with acceptable 15% throughput drop

description: Replacement QPU warmup takes 12 min instead of 10 min on QFE-100
fix_applied: Revision B silicon has slightly different thermal profile - 12 min within tolerance

description: QF-003 on QFE-200 - FCM health 55% - cannot schedule downtime for 6 weeks
fix_applied: Applied quantum buffer reset and experimental power throttling to extend FCM life

description: Customer asks about 2-step vs 3-step calibration after firmware upgrade
fix_applied: Advised 3-step calibration per v2.4 manual - old 2-step deprecated since v2.0

description: QF-003 on QFE-100 - FCM health 48% - previous buffer reset worn off
fix_applied: Tried buffer reset then FCM replacement in sequence for zero data loss

description: Customer confused about warmup temp - wiki says 65C but manual says 75C
fix_applied: Confirmed 75C is correct per v2.4 manual - wiki is outdated from v1.x era

description: Slow throughput on QFE-100 after 8 months without maintenance
fix_applied: Ran quarterly maintenance tasks - found thermal paste degradation - replaced and recalibrated

description: QF-009 Cluster Consensus Failure on 4-node QFE-200 cluster
fix_applied: Found NTP misconfiguration causing 800ms clock skew - fixed NTP and cluster recovered

description: Customer locked out after 5 failed login attempts - lockout_duration too short
fix_applied: Increased lockout_duration from 300s to 600s and enabled progressive lockout

description: QF-003 on QFE-200 - FCM replaced but calibration Step 1 fails afterwards
fix_applied: Found incompatible FCM revision - replaced with correct revision and calibration passed

description: Customer running max_threads=8 per old wiki recommendation - poor throughput
fix_applied: Updated to max_threads=16 per current manual - throughput improved 45%

description: Customer reports 2-step calibration from wiki docs failed on new QFE-300
fix_applied: Guided customer to use 3-step calibration from v2.4 manual - wiki is deprecated
